# Spider Nest

## Theme

A dark cave completely consumed by giant spider webs.

The deeper you go, the more the nest comes alive.

## Biome Gameplay

Spider Nest teaches:

- avoiding poison
- clearing small enemies
- positioning
- fighting area denial

Rule:
Spiders overwhelm the player through numbers and poison rather than raw damage.

---

# Spider

## Role
Fast Melee

## Difficulty
Easy

## Description
Basic hunting spider.

## AI
- Rushes toward the player.
- Constantly chases.
- Attacks quickly.

## Basic Attack
Bite

## Ability
None

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Attack
- Death

---

# Venom Spider

## Role
Poison Hunter

## Difficulty
Medium

## Description
Larger spider carrying deadly venom.

## AI
- Aggressively pursues the player.
- Uses venom whenever possible.

## Basic Attack
Venom Bite

## Ability
Poison Spit

Launches a venom projectile.

Effects:
- poison damage over time

Cooldown:
8 seconds.

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Bite
- Spit
- Death

---

# Cocoon Hatchling

## Role
Ambush Unit

## Difficulty
Easy

## Description
A cocoon waiting to hatch.

## AI
- Remains inactive.
- Activates when player approaches.

## Ability
Hatch

After opening, becomes a Spider.

One-time ability.

## Required Animations
- Idle
- Hatch
- Death

---

# Broodmother

## Role
Biome Boss

## Difficulty
Boss

## Description

The queen of the nest.

She never leaves her egg chamber.

Instead of chasing the player, she controls the battlefield.

## Movement

Does not move.

Remains attached to the center of the nest during the entire fight.

## Basic Attack

Venom Spit

Large poison projectile.

---

## Ability 1

Egg Sac

Lays several eggs.

After a few seconds they hatch into Spiders.

---

## Ability 2

Web Volley

Shoots webs across the arena.

Effects:

- slows players
- creates web zones

---

## Ability 3

Venom Rain

Spits poison into the air.

Several poison pools appear after a short delay.

---

## Ability 4

Call the Swarm

Summons:

- Spiders
- Venom Spiders

---

## Phase 2

Triggered at 50% HP.

Changes

- lays eggs faster
- webs cover larger areas

---

## Phase 3

Triggered at 25% HP.

Enters survival mode.

Changes

- constantly summons spiders
- spits poison more frequently
- arena slowly fills with webs

---

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Spit
- Egg Lay
- Roar
- Death

## VFX

- poison spit
- web projectiles
- egg spawning
- poison pools
- web growth

## SFX

- spider hiss
- egg cracking
- web shooting
- poison splash
